creator: jsm@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Andrew from comment #17)
Ok we are in a "funny" situation according to freshports.org only quartely has build firefox 122.0.1 (forgotten reset of port revision so the pkg is firefox-122.0.1_3,2) That package does not work. If you are fast you can grab the former firefox-122.0.3,2 by switching to latest. 

This makes it hard to rule out the dependencies, but can you confirm that firefox-122.0.3_2 works? I just did for me FWIW YMMV but please do a test if  you have the opportunity.
Thanks
